---
name: Add search
about: Add a controlled search input for customer and subject
title: "Add search"
labels: assessment
---

## Goal

Add a controlled search input that filters tickets by customer name and subject.

## Requirements

- Search input must be controlled with React state
- Search must match customer name and ticket subject
- Search and status filtering must work together

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Search input value is controlled by React state
- [ ] Typing filters tickets by customer and subject
- [ ] Status filter and search combine correctly
- [ ] Clearing the search restores the previous filtered results

## Be ready to explain

- What a controlled input is
- How the search value updates React state
- How `filter` is used with the ticket list
